news.title: Neues Lokal "Biernat's" – Kölsch statt Spritzer – Bar bringt Köln-Flair nach Wien - Heute
news.summary:
# Summary

A new bar called "Biernat's" has opened in Vienna, bringing the authentic atmosphere and beer culture of Cologne to the Austrian capital. The establishment focuses on serving Kölsch beer (Cologne's famous local beer) instead of Vienna's traditional wine spritzers. Visitors to Vienna looking for a change of pace or fans of German beer culture will find this a worthwhile destination for experiencing a different regional drinking tradition.

news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - Nieuwsblad
news.summary:
# Summary

A group of 33 people failed to show up for their reservation at Belgian restaurant De Bomma, leaving the kitchen's prepared menu unused—instead, they sent a cat to the restaurant as a prank or message. This no-show represents a significant loss for the restaurant and highlights the frustration restaurants face with unreliable reservations. Visitors to the area should note De Bomma's experience as a reminder of the importance of honoring restaurant reservations or canceling in advance.

news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

A group of 33 people failed to show up for their reservation at Belgian restaurant De Bomma, leaving the kitchen with prepared meals and staff with wasted time—the only "guest" who arrived was someone's cat. This is a cautionary tale about the importance of honoring restaurant reservations, especially for large groups, as no-shows can significantly impact a restaurant's operations and revenue. Visitors to the area should take note: restaurants like De Bomma rely on accurate reservations to manage their kitchens and staff efficiently.

Visitors to the area should be aware of this new dining option, though its premium pricing and controversial status may make it worth considering whether it aligns with your budget and values.
